articles.author: Vuk Zdinjak, Celine Provini
articles.title: BofA resets Google stock price target after earnings smasher - thestreet.com
articles.description: Bank of America reveals what could happen to Google shares.
articles.content:
Key Points
  • Alphabet stock is up about 17.8% year to date.
  • It beat Q1 estimates, with revenue rising 22% year over year to $109.9 billion.
  • Bank of America raised its price tar… [+3948 chars]
